creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Done for the English pages. The translators will pick it up as they  
usually do for other changes. By the way, if you're going to be sending 
diffs for documentation and/or the web pages, consider pulling down the 
doc and www repository sections. The HTML you see is generated from the 
SGML in those sections.
